description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and defines a single test stage. Add a references job in the test stage that runs a before_script to install bash with apk add --no-cache bash, then executes bash -x ./bin/check-script-references followed by ./bin/sanity-check-scripts. Add a shellcheck job also in the test stage that downloads and extracts the latest ShellCheck binary using wget https://storage.googleapis.com/shellcheck/shellcheck-stable.linux.x86_64.tar.xz -O - | xzcat | tar -xv in its before_script, and then runs find ./bin/scripts/ -name '*.sh' | xargs ./shellcheck-stable/shellcheck -x and ./shellcheck-stable/shellcheck -x ./bin/check-script-references ./bin/workflow-script-commons.sh ./bin/source_vars_template.sh ./bin/start-failover-procedure.sh in its script. No caches, artifacts, or special triggers are defined.
